sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I can see the ascii clearly. The bottom-right grid has cells at:
- Row 36-41: RRRRRRccbbbbbbccbbbbbbcc (cols 36-60)
  - Cell (0,0): cols 36-41, red (6 chars)
  - Gap: cols 42-43, charcoal (2 chars)
  - Cell (0,1): cols 44-49, blue (6 chars)
  - Gap: cols 50-51, charcoal (2 chars)
  - Cell (0,2): cols 52-57, blue (6 chars)
  - Gap: cols 58-59, charcoal (2 chars)
So the cells are 6x6 with 2-column gaps between them.
Current bottom-right grid state:
- Row 0: R b b
- Row 1: b center b
- Row 2: b b b
I need to match one of the three source patterns. Let me check which one:
- Top-left: b-R-b / R-center-b / b-R-R
- Top-right: b-R-b / R-center-R / b-R-b
- Bottom-left: R-b-b / R-center-R / b-b-R
The bottom-left grid has the pattern R-b-b / R-center-R / b-b-R which is closest to what I have (R-b-b / b-center-b / b-b-b). I need to change:
- (1,0) from b to R
- (1,2) from b to R
- (2,2) from b to R
Cell centers:
- (1,0): rows 44-49, cols 36-41 → center (47, 39)
- (1,2): rows 44-49, cols 52-57 → center (47, 55)
- (2,2): rows 52-57, cols 52-57 → center (55, 55)
Let me click these three cells to match the bottom-left pattern.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Bottom-right grid cells are at:
# Row 0: (36-41, 36-41), (36-41, 44-49), (36-41, 52-57)
# Row 1: (44-49, 36-41), center, (44-49, 52-57)
# Row 2: (52-57, 36-41), (52-57, 44-49), (52-57, 52-57)
#
# Current: R-b-b / b-center-b / b-b-b
# Target (bottom-left pattern): R-b-b / R-center-R / b-b-R
# Need to change: (1,0) b->R, (1,2) b->R, (2,2) b->R

# Click the three cells that need to be red
action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 47, 'col': 39},  # (1,0)
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 47, 'col': 55},  # (1,2)
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 55, 'col': 55}   # (2,2)
])
</parameter>
